title: hieracium urticaceum subsp. delphinale
intro: Hieracium urticaceum subsp. delphinale, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hawkweed include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. Hawkweed can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
